1.0.3.en: Initial release: ESPHome ventilation control with auto-detection for modern and legacy API versions

1.0.5.en: Improved app description, README, and images for App Store compliance.

1.1.0.en: Added Open AIR Valve device support with position control, flow actions, and re-homing. Added fan speed measurement capability. Fixed French translations.

1.1.2.en: Added automatic fan curve with humidity-based speed control, pause/resume flow actions, and configurable thresholds. Updated store descriptions and documentation for Valve support. Fixed French accent errors across Valve driver and app settings.

1.1.4.en: Added manual device entry fallback when mDNS discovery fails to find devices.

1.1.5.en: Improved connection error messages during device pairing: specific, actionable errors (wrong encryption key, wrong password, connection refused, etc.) instead of generic timeouts. Localized in EN/FR/NL.
